meaning: n.饰带,花边,缎带,鞋带vt.扎带子,扎,饰以花边vi.缚带子
examples: She finally found the perfect gown, a beautiful creation trimmed with lace.
I have a good pair of skates, but no matter how tightly I lace them, my ankles wobble.
The lingerie was exquisite; silk, handmade and trimmed with a cobweb of lace.
Kerry Washington was a stunner in a marigold lace and fringed number from Stella McCartney.
He was wearing a white shirt with blue thin stripes, jeans, and brown leather lace-up boots.
